title: Toto's Carpet Tweaks
description: Adds a few quality of life changes to the SMP experience by providing global villager discounts and forcing spectators to return to their last position.
body:
**This mod requires [Carpet](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet)**.

Toto's Carpet Tweaks adds a few quality of life changes to the SMP experience by providing global villager discounts, less cat spawns (because it's super annoying), and teleporting spectators back to their last survival position to prevent illegitimate movement.

This mod is designed to be installed on servers. Client-side installation is not required.

For more information about the carpet rules for this mod, please refer to [the readme in source control](https://github.com/totorewa/totos-carpet-tweaks/blob/main/README.md).
